Name.description: Name of the earnings rate (max length = 100)

TypeOfUnits.description: Type of units used to record earnings (max length = 50). Only When RateType is RATEPERUNIT

IsExemptFromTax.description: Most payments are subject to tax, so you should only set this value if you are sure that a payment is exempt from PAYG withholding

IsExemptFromSuper.description: See the ATO website for details of which payments are exempt from SGC

IsReportableAsW1.description: Boolean to determine if the earnings rate is reportable or exempt from W1

IsQualifyingEarnings.description: Optional Boolean to determine if the earnings rate is considered as qualifying earnings for superannuation guarantee calculations. When not specified value is calculated based on earnings type and superannuation settings

AllowanceContributesToAnnualLeaveRate.description: Boolean to determine if the allowance earnings rate contributes towards annual leave rate. Only applicable if EarningsType is ALLOWANCE and RateType is RATEPERUNIT

AllowanceContributesToOvertimeRate.description: Boolean to determine if the allowance earnings rate contributes towards overtime allowance rate. Only applicable if EarningsType is ALLOWANCE and RateType is RATEPERUNIT

RatePerUnit.description: Default rate per unit (optional). Only applicable if RateType is RATEPERUNIT.

Multiplier.description: This is the multiplier used to calculate the rate per unit, based on the employee’s ordinary earnings rate. For example, for time and a half enter 1.5. Only applicable if RateType is MULTIPLE

AccrueLeave.description: Indicates that this earnings rate should accrue leave. Only applicable if RateType is MULTIPLE

Amount.description: Optional Amount for FIXEDAMOUNT RateType EarningsRate
